recipe:
```html

Sunrise Fruit & Cream Breakfast Smoothie

Prep time: 5 mins | Cook time: 0 mins

Ingredients:

  • 2 Bunches Grapes (Frozen prior to blending for a creamy texture)
  • 1 Pint Blueberries
  • 1 Cup Milk (Dairy or your preferred plant-based alternative)
  • Optional add-ins: A splash of honey or a pinch of cinnamon if available in your pantry.

Instructions:

  1. Prep the Fruit: Wash the grapes and blueberries thoroughly. For the best consistency, place the grapes in the freezer for at least 1 hour (or overnight) before blending.
  2. Combine: Add the frozen grapes, fresh blueberries, and the milk into your blender canister.
  3. Blend: Start on a low speed and gradually increase to high. Blend for 45–60 seconds until the mixture is perfectly smooth and vibrant purple.
  4. Adjust: If the smoothie is too thick, add a splash more milk; if you prefer it sweeter, add a drizzle of honey or agave.
  5. Serve: Pour into a tall glass and enjoy your refreshing, waste-free morning treat!

Chef's Tip: By freezing the grapes, you eliminate the need for ice, which keeps the flavor concentrated and rich.

```
